Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had non-verbal sounds (e.g., crying, whinning, gasping, moaning, groaning) which may be an indicator of possible pain in the last five days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
